title: Music Controller
description: A Fabric mod that lets you play any of the official Minecraft music tracks on demand. Requires Fabric API
body:
# 🎵 Music Controller

A Fabric mod for Minecraft that lets you take full control of the game's built-in music. Browse and play any of the 63 official Minecraft tracks on demand from a clean in-game UI — no resource packs or external files needed.

---

## Features

- 🎵 All 63 official Minecraft songs in one place
- 🔍 Search tracks by name instantly
- ⏮ ⏸ ⏭ Full playback controls — prev, play, pause, next, stop
- ⌨️ Keyboard shortcuts — `M` open UI, `[` prev, `P` pause, `]` next, `K` stop
- 🔔 Uses the vanilla "Now Playing" toast when a song starts
- 🎮 Suppresses vanilla background music while active
- 💿 Automatically stops when a music disc is played in the world
- ⚡ Vanilla music resumes instantly after stopping

---

## Installation

1. Install [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/use/)
2. Install [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
3. Download the latest jar from [Releases](../../releases)
4. Drop it into your `mods` folder

---

## Requirements

| Dependency | Version |
|------------|---------|
| Minecraft | 26.1.2 |
| Fabric Loader | ≥ 0.17.3 |
| Fabric API | ✅ Required |
| ModMenu | ⭐ Optional |

---

## Keybinds

| Key | Action |
|-----|--------|
| `M` | Open Music Controller UI |
| `[` | Previous track |
| `P` | Play / Pause |
| `]` | Next track |
| `K` | Stop |

---
